run_summary.summary: Follow-up scan, Apr 17. Two new items since this morning's run: SOJOS Ruby confirmed she updated the collaboration agreement with the dates Kenny proposed (draft 4/23, Video 2 in May) — needs review and signature today. BHG x Walmart: Gretta confirmed products arriving today and Saturday, including a table that requires someone home to receive. Also skipped a gifted-only inbound from HULALA HOME (no cash value).

suggestions.message: Ruby (sojosvision.com) updated the collaboration agreement with the new timeline Kenny requested — draft by 4/23, Video 2 in May. Check the updated agreement now, sign it, and return to Ruby. Draft is only 6 days away.

Gretta (people.inc) confirmed most BHG x Walmart Spring Social Campaign items arrive today (Apr 17), with 3 more arriving Saturday Apr 19 — including the table, which requires someone home to receive. Tracking details coming from Gretta this morning.

deals.next_action: Review updated SOJOS agreement and sign/return to Ruby — first video draft due 4/23
deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Ruby confirmed she updated the collaboration agreement per Kenny's request — new dates: Video 1 draft 4/23, Video 2 in May. Agreement ready to review and sign. Reply to marketing202@sojosvision.com.
